title: Craftable
description: A small data pack/mod that adds more crafting options to your game, like being able to craft tridents and name tags.
body:
![Craftable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5faa81745ebdb65bc218864ef4d1263b0163ba3.png)

[![fg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78b762677533e21c03c505efd0363d177e60f9aa.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/craftable-1-16/)

_**I would recommend getting a mod like [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), as it makes it easier to know the crafting recipes in game.**_

Craftable is a datapack/mod that lets you craft the following items:
- Bell
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Glow Ink Sac
- Ice
- Packed Ice
- Name Tag
- String
- Totem of Undying
- Trident
- Gravel
- Cobweb
- Flint
- Grass Block
- Sand
- Sugar Cane
- All Saplings and the Propagule
- Brown Dye
- Green Dye
- Diamond, Golden, and Iron Horse Armor

_Originally Created Mar 8th, 2021_
